layers.name: Engine
layers.description: 排盘计算 + 规则分析引擎

layers.name: Report
layers.description: 报告生成层（模板 + Prompt + LLM 调用）

commits.message: fix(engine+report): 统一用神对外口径为仲裁后结果
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: fix(wechat): rewrite prompt to match reference case style - direct, punchy, conversational
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: fix: enable true solar time correction automatically when birth_place has longitude
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: feat: upgrade consumer report to 精读决策版 + wechat to friend tone
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: chore: fix Dockerfile paths + add sync_db script
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: feat(report): P4 timeline layering constraint in Part3 prompt
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: feat(report): P1 daily strategy + P5 consistency validation
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: fix(consumer): inject engine raw wangshuai data to prevent LLM hallucination
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: fix(engine): codex audit fixes - lunar calendar, Part4 deterministic, fuzzy city match, domain enhancement
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: feat(engine): commercial polish P1-P6 - true solar time, yongshen arbitration, domain profiles, LLM boundaries, consumer report, structured chat
commits.author: caizaiheng

commits.message: feat(engine): upgrade to v3.1 - event inference with canggan, monthly events, shensha triggers
commits.author: caizaiheng
